channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Publishers Deny Rumours About Release of Game of Thrones Novel Winds of Winter
item.description: Fans of George R.R. Martin's 'A Song of Ice and Fire' series were recently excited by reports suggesting that 'The Winds of Winter', the long-awaited sixth book, might be released later this year. How...

item.title: Marcos Appoints Eduardo Oban as New National Security Adviser Following Año’s Resignation
item.description: After serving as National Security Adviser for over three years, Eduardo Año has stepped down from his post. President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. appointed retired Air Force General Eduardo Oban Jr., a form...

item.title: Sindh launches second phase of Solar Home Systems to provide clean energy to rural households
item.description: The second phase of Sindh’s Solar Home Systems (SHS) initiative will be launched today in Larkana by Pakistan Peoples Party (PPP) Chairman Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari, alongside Sindh Chief Minister Syed M...

item.title: Senate Panel Highlights Smuggling and Tax Evasion Impacting National Revenue
item.description: A Senate subcommittee on Interior has expressed serious concerns over rampant smuggling and tax evasion in Pakistan, especially in Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa, causing massive losses to the nat...

item.title: Atletico Madrid Edge Past Barcelona To Reach Champions League Semi-finals After Fierce Battle
item.description: Atletico Madrid don book their place for Champions League semi-finals after dem manage hold Barcelona for one intense quarter-final clash. Even though Diego Simeone’s boys lose 2-1 for the second leg ...

item.title: Grant Northey dies in multi-vehicle crash on Tamborine Mountain, remembered fondly by family and friends
item.description: Grant Northey, 52, tragically passed away following a serious collision involving a motorcycle and two cars on Tamborine Mountain Road in Queensland's Scenic Rim. The incident occurred around 10:40am ...

item.title: Social Media Influencer TheGyad Reaction Dies in Road Accident in South Africa
item.description: The online community is mourning the loss of social media influencer TheGyad Reaction, real name Mpho Netshinombelo, who tragically died at 27. The Limpopo-based content creator, famous for his bold r...

item.title: Exploring the Rise and Allure of the Tradwife Phenomenon
item.description: The article follows a journalist who immerses herself for a month in the world of 'tradwives'—women who promote traditional domestic roles online through platforms like Instagram and TikTok. She explo...

item.title: Premier League: Manchester United's Champions League hopes hinge on upcoming fixtures
item.description: Manchester United's bid to secure a Champions League spot next season has taken a knock following a 2-1 defeat to Leeds United. This loss, coupled with the performances of rivals like Liverpool and Ch...

item.title: Tanzania Addresses Elephant Encounters with New Measures
item.description: Serikali ya Tanzania imechukua hatua za kusimama imara dhidi ya changamoto ya wanyamapori, hasa tembo, wanaovamia maeneo ya watu katika Wilaya ya Meatu, Mkoa wa Simiyu. Mhe. Naibu Waziri wa Wizara ya ...

item.title: Government to review and consult on new internship and volunteering guidelines
item.description: The Tanzanian government is working to strengthen practical training for graduates by introducing a new framework for internships and volunteering. The guidelines were finalised in the 2024/2025 finan...

item.title: King Charles to Visit US and Address Congress Highlighting Historical and Cultural Ties
item.description: King Charles III is set to make his first state visit to the United States as monarch from April 27, accompanied by Queen Camilla. During the four-day visit, he will address both chambers of the US Co...

item.title: Pastor OT Surprises Wife with Car and Cash Gift on Wedding Day
item.description: During a spectacular wedding ceremony, Pastor OT showed a grand gesture of love towards his wife, Vivian Temitope Eyoma, by presenting her with a brand-new car and a cheque worth KSh 480,000. The cere...

item.title: Government launches P10 per liter fuel discount program for jeepney and UV drivers
item.description: On April 14, 2026, the Philippine government rolled out a new subsidized fuel program aimed at supporting public transport drivers, particularly jeepney and UV Express drivers. Under this program, eli...

item.title: French authorities attempt to halt Kanye West’s Marseille concert amid public controversy
item.description: French authorities are reportedly taking steps to prevent Kanye West from performing at his scheduled June concert at the Marseille Vélodrome. This comes after the rapper was denied entry to the UK, l...

item.title: Tensions rise between Trump and Meloni over Italy's stance on Iran and Israel
item.description: US President Donald Trump has publicly criticised Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, accusing her of lacking courage after Italy chose not to support American strikes on Iran. In an interview with...

item.title: Top Headlines From Nigeria Today, Wednesday, 15th April, 2026
item.description: Good morning Naija! Today we dey look top stories wey dey ginger news for Nigeria. President Bola Tinubu don yan say the new tax laws wey him government don introduce go help correct the wahala wey co...

item.title: Malema prepares legal strategy to appeal potential prison sentence
item.description: EFF leader Julius Malema has outlined a detailed legal plan to immediately appeal if he is sentenced to prison during his upcoming court proceedings in the Eastern Cape. Malema, convicted in October o...

item.title: York Police Charge 15 Individuals Over Alleged Fraud in Homelessness Prevention Program
item.description: York Regional Police have charged 15 individuals in connection with alleged fraudulent claims made to a homelessness prevention program in Vaughan, Ontario. The central figure is Isaac Oppong, a forme...

item.title: Amit Shah Promises Constitutional Resolution for Gorkha Issue Without Dividing Bengal
item.description: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, during his rally in Gangarampur, South Dinajpur, clarified that if BJP comes to power, the Gorkha issue will be addressed in a constitutional manner without splitting Be...
